req.title: Card freeze / unfreeze (negative variant)
req.statement: A customer shall freeze or unfreeze their card instantly; frozen cards must reject all authorization attempts. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case

"""
pytest test suite
Requirement: A customer shall freeze or unfreeze their card instantly;
             frozen cards must reject all authorization attempts.
             Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits)
             must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch
from enum import Enum
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / service stubs
# (Replace with real imports when integrating against the actual codebase)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class CardStatus(Enum):
    ACTIVE = "ACTIVE"
    FROZEN = "FROZEN"
    BLOCKED = "BLOCKED"  # permanently blocked – different from frozen


class AuthorizationResult(Enum):
    APPROVED = "APPROVED"
    DECLINED_FROZEN = "DECLINED_FROZEN"
    DECLINED_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS = "DECLINED_INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS"
    DECLINED_UNAUTHORIZED = "DECLINED_UNAUTHORIZED"
    DECLINED_LIMIT_EXCEEDED = "DECLINED_LIMIT_EXCEEDED"
    DECLINED_INVALID_CARD = "DECLINED_INVALID_CARD"


class CardNotFoundError(Exception):
    pass


class UnauthorizedActionError(Exception):
    pass


class CardAlreadyInStateError(Exception):
    pass


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Minimal in-process implementations (replace with real service layer)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class Card:
    def __init__(
        self,
        card_id: str,
        owner_customer_id: str,
        balance: Decimal,
        daily_limit: Decimal,
        status: CardStatus = CardStatus.ACTIVE,
    ):
        self.card_id = card_id
        self.owner_customer_id = owner_customer_id
        self.balance = balance
        self.daily_limit = daily_limit
        self.daily_spent = Decimal("0.00")
        self.status = status
        self.freeze_timestamp: datetime | None = None
        self.unfreeze_timestamp: datetime | None = None


class CardService:
    """Thin service layer – the real target under test."""

    def __init__(self, card_repository, auth_logger):
        self._repo = card_repository
        self._logger = auth_logger

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    #  Freeze / unfreeze                                                   #
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #

    def freeze_card(self, card_id: str, requesting_customer_id: str) -> Card:
        card = self._get_and_authorise(card_id, requesting_customer_id)
        if card.status == CardStatus.FROZEN:
            raise CardAlreadyInStateError("Card is already frozen.")
        card.status = CardStatus.FROZEN
        card.freeze_timestamp = datetime.utcnow()
        self._repo.save(card)
        return card

    def unfreeze_card(self, card_id: str, requesting_customer_id: str) -> Card:
        card = self._get_and_authorise(card_id, requesting_customer_id)
        if card.status == CardStatus.ACTIVE:
            raise CardAlreadyInStateError("Card is already active.")
        card.status = CardStatus.ACTIVE
        card.unfreeze_timestamp = datetime.utcnow()
        self._repo.save(card)
        return card

    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #
    #  Authorization                                                        #
    # ------------------------------------------------------------------ #

    def authorize_transaction(
        self,
        card_id: str,
        amount: Decimal,
        merchant_id: str,
    ) -> AuthorizationResult:
        try:
            card = self._repo.get(card_id)
        except CardNotFoundError:
            return AuthorizationResult.DECLINED_INVALID_CARD

        # Frozen check – must be first
        if card.status == CardStatus.FROZEN:
